TRIAL CONCLUDED. IN 1 DAY

REMOVED FROM COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON OCT-25-2004 IN DEPT. 602 - JUDGE D. MITCHELL, REPORTER R. FUNG, CLERK I. HAMMER, ATTY FOR PLNTF., PLNTF. & DFT. PRESENT IN COURT. WITNESSES S/E, DOC EVID INTRO. COURT RULED IN FAVOR OF PLNTF. PLNTF'S ATTY TO SUBMIT WRITTEN FINDINGS & PROPOSED JUDGMENT. DFT. HAS UNTIL 11/2/04 TO REPLY. PLNTF. & DFT. EACH OWE $140 PER DIEM FEES FOR THIS DATE.

STATEMENT OF DECISION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DURALEE MULTIFABRICS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHADES OF SARAH, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 200 KANSAS STREET, SPACES 19 AND 21, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $4,783.80 RENT, $407.58 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,191.38, SEE SCANNED DOC. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DURALEE MULTIFABRICS, INC. COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-30-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-25-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF DURALEE MULTIFABRICS, INC.'S MOTIONTO CONTINUE TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED FROM 8/30/04 TO 9/7/04 @ 9:00AM IN DEPT. 206. NO SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET. WRITTEN ORDER PENDING. JUDGE ROBERT DONDERO; CLERKS: VERA MU/DIANNE BOFFI; REPORTER: JO ANN BRYCE #3321 (206)
